title: Customs Duty Rates on Gold, Silver, and Precious Metals Revised by Ministry of Finance
content:
# Customs Duty Rates on Gold, Silver, and Precious Metals Revised by Ministry of Finance

Ek important update hai! The Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) ne gold, silver, aur other precious metal imports par customs duty rates revise kiye hain. Yeh changes Notification No. 16/2026-Customs dated May 12, 2026, ke through announce kiye gaye hain.

**Key Highlights of the Revision:**

*   **Effective Date:** Yeh revised rates May 13, 2026, se लागू ho gaye hain.
*   **Amended Notifications:** This notification primarily amends Notification No. 11/2018-Customs (Social Welfare Surcharge - SWS) aur Notification No. 11/2021-Customs (Agriculture Infrastructure and Development Cess - AIDC) to restructure the cess framework.
*   **Overall Duty Hike:** Gold aur silver ke imports par total effective customs duty ab 6% se badhkar 15% ho gayi hai. Ismein Basic Customs Duty (BCD) 5% se 10% ho gayi hai, aur Agriculture Infrastructure and Development Cess (AIDC) 1% se 5% ho gaya hai.
*   **Revised AIDC Rates:**
    *   Specific platinum findings aur Tariff Heading 7111 ke goods par AIDC 5.4% hoga.
    *   Gold findings, silver findings, coin imports, aur specified Chapter 71 products par AIDC 5% hoga.
    *   Notification No. 57/2000-Customs ke under aane wale gold aur silver imports par AIDC 4.35% hoga.
*   **Spent Catalyst Imports:** Spent catalyst ya ash containing precious metals (Tariff Heading 7112) ke imports par 4.35% concessional customs duty lagegi, provided ki Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change se recovery ya recycling purposes ke liye certificate submit kiya jaaye.
*   **Objective:** Iss revision ka main aim import duties ko rationalize karna, SWS aur AIDC rates ko revise karna, aur non-essential imports ko control karna hai, taaki country ke foreign exchange reserves aur current account position ko support kiya ja sake.

Yeh kadam precious metal importers aur jewellery manufacturers ke liye significant implications rakhta hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 14 May 2026*
